violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

Pan with soapy water and brush were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black residue and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice voluntarily disposed. Unit taken out of service. PIC to wash and sanitize equipment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

Beverage tubing was observed in contact with ice used for drinks at the bar. Beverage tubing and cold plate beverage cooling devices must not be in contact with stored ice. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024
Faucet in mens restroom observed in poor repair. Hot water is not dispensing from faucet. New Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2024

The following physical facilities is observed in poor repair: 1.drywall in back kitchen near light switch observed with holes. 2.ceilings in back kitchen area observed tiles detaching from ceiling. 3.walls near basement stairs observed with holes. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024
